CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2025 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-06-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT RAVYN MIDDLETON's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiffs Attendance At Deposition And For An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion of defendant Ravyn Middleton for an order compelling plaintiff Crystal Banks's attendance at deposition, and for sanctions, is granted. Banks has not appeared at duly noticed depositions. She is ordered to appear for deposition at a date specified by Middleton and the deposition shall occur by August 22, 2025 unless the parties agree otherwise. Middleton shall meet and confer about the selected date. The court finds that Banks's failure to appear at a duly noticed deposition is a misuse of the discovery process and orders her to pay $720 to Middleton within 30 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. Tatevik Gasparyam, Esq. of Morgan and Morgan (tel: 213-757-6048) seeking to withdraw.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF CRYSTAL BANKS.

Matter discussed. Upon conclusion of discussion, the Court grants counsel's motion for withdrawal.

Counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order on the judicial council form.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
